case_title: DE LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY vs. GRAHAM, MARNA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JAYNE KELLY DE LOPEZ FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY
